lastSession.summary: v9.2.0: Rich GitHub Issues from PRD. prd-breakdown now creates GitHub issues by default with rich bodies (description, Gherkin AC, implementation context, verification commands). Two-pass dependency linking for bidirectional cross-references. --no-issues replaces --create-issues.
completedTasks: Rewrote prd-breakdown.md Phase 3.5 with rich issue body template and two-pass dependency linking
Updated Phase 4 summary with GitHub issue counts and cross-reference info
Updated usage examples, syntax table, and error handling table
Enhanced labels: claude-harness, mvp, high-risk conditionals
Updated README.md with v9.2.0 changelog and revised prd-breakdown docs
Bumped version to 9.2.0 in both plugin.json files
